subject: Re: EV charger install - inquiry
body: Level 2 charger is straightforward. 60A circuit off your panel to a wall connector in the garage. If the panel has room, half a day. I'll come look and give you a firm number. Mornings before 7 or after 5 best for me.

subject: Honey order - 12 oz wildflower
body: Got your message. 6 cases of 12 oz wildflower ready for Friday pickup. Same wholesale price as last batch. Let me know if you need the 8 oz too.

subject: Invoice - Verree Road rewire
body: Invoice attached for the kitchen and bedroom circuits. Labor and materials itemized. Card link in the email if that's easier than a check. Thanks for the work.

subject: Re: 200A panel upgrade - quote
body: Following up. If the quote works I can schedule the meter swap with PECO for the week of the 16th. Need a day's notice to pull the permit.

subject: Club night - room change
body: Roman, community center moved us to the larger room Wednesday. Same time, 6:30. Can you post it in the group so nobody walks into the wrong door?

subject: Mite treatment timing
body: Quick note for the newsletter: I'm pulling honey supers end of next month and treating right after. Happy to share the schedule if it helps the newer keepers.

subject: Re: Year-end numbers - invoice summary
body: Steve, one more thing. I bought the new extractor in November, about $900. That should be a deduction. It's in the honey tab.

subject: Saturday market - I'll be late
body: Heads up, I may be 15 minutes late opening Saturday, finishing a job. Booth will still be up by 7:15. Thanks.

subject: Re: Coming down in February
body: The labels look good. Make the lettering a touch bigger so the older customers can read it. Bring a few printed and we'll see them on the jar.

subject: Mila's birthday - Baltimore
body: Andriy, I'll drive down the Saturday before Mila's birthday. Tell me what she's into now so I don't buy her something for a four-year-old. What time works?

subject: Deep frames - one more case
body: Add one more case of deep frames to the order if it hasn't shipped. Building out two more boxes before the spring buildup.

subject: Generator hookup - estimate
body: Thanks for calling. A standby generator transfer switch runs around $1,800 to $2,400 installed depending on the panel. I'll come measure and give you a firm number this week.

subject: Re: rough inspection EL-2026-0418
body: Inspection passed this morning. When can I expect the final once the drywall is closed up? Want to schedule the client.

subject: Co-op invoice - February
body: February honey invoice attached, 4 cases wildflower. Running low on the dark buckwheat, that won't be back until the August pull.

subject: Apprentice hours - sign-off
body: Darren, send me your hours for the month so I can sign the apprenticeship sheet. You're solid on rough-in now, we'll work on load calcs next.

subject: Cultural center - volunteer wiring
body: Irina, I can look at the kitchen outlets at the center Sunday afternoon. If it's just GFCIs it's quick. I'll bring what I have on the truck.

subject: Re: Spring Open - bracket and registrations
body: Bracket looks right. Two byes in the under-1400 section. Print 30 pairing sheets, we'll have walk-ins.

subject: Honey labels - print order
body: Need 500 wildflower labels and 300 buckwheat, same stock as last run. Proof coming from my daughter. Hold the order until I approve it.

subject: Panel quote - the Reillys
body: Good to meet you today. Sub-panel for the finished basement, 100A, runs about $1,400 with the permit. I can start in two weeks. Quote attached.

subject: Western Union - confirm amount
body: Sending Mama the usual the 1st. Hryvnia moved a little this week so she'll get a bit more. I'll call her Sunday as always.

subject: Re: Coffee Saturday?
body: Bring the Nimzowitsch too. I want to show you the line that beat me Tuesday on Lichess. Still annoyed about it.
